overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, neon-lit waterfront promenade in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The camera moves past a large digital billboard structure and continues along the water's edge, with palm trees swaying in the storm and the glowing city skyline visible through heavy fog and rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade beneath digital billboard structure

events.description: exiting the covered building area into open rain, leaving the digital billboard behind

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet promenade under the shelter of a large building with a glowing digital screen

entered.detail: large angular building with illuminated screen displaying nature imagery and red accent lighting
tall modern lamp post with multiple warm white lights
metal safety railing along the water's edge
rain-slicked tiled walkway reflecting ambient lights

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a large futuristic structure with a glowing digital billboard, the camera moves along a covered waterfront promenade. Street lamps cast warm light on the wet pavement while rain falls heavily beyond the building's overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees overlooking neon-lit bay

events.description: heavy rain becomes clearly visible against the dark sky as camera leaves building shelter
camera pans slightly right to focus on prominent palm tree swaying in the wind

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade, observing the swaying palm trees and distant neon city lights through the storm

entered.detail: tall palm tree with fronds swaying in the storm wind, trunk illuminated by ambient city light
futuristic cityscape with prominent pink and blue neon signs visible through heavy fog and rain
dark water of the bay with rain droplets creating ripples on the surface

segments.scene_description: Moving into the open waterfront, the camera passes a swaying palm tree while the full view of the neon-lit city skyline emerges across the foggy bay. Heavy rain falls steadily as the promenade continues alongside the dark water, with the distant glow of pink and blue signs piercing through the storm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered warmth of a futuristic promenade into the immersive storm of a neon-lit waterfront. It begins beneath a large architectural structure where a glowing digital billboard and street lamps cast a warm light over the wet pavement. As the camera moves forward, it leaves the building's overhang and emerges into the open air, passing a swaying palm tree amidst a heavy downpour. The scene then expands to reveal a sprawling city skyline across a foggy bay, where the dark water is illuminated by the distant, piercing glow of pink and blue neon signs.
